claim: AI voice agents can be built no-code using VoiceAPI and n8n in less than 30 minutes
actionable: Use VoiceAPI for voice synthesis and n8n for workflow automation to build voice agents without custom code
source_title: I Built an AI Voice Agent That Never Misses a Call (No Code)

claim: Missed calls = missed revenue; answer every call within 20 seconds with voice agents to reduce client loss
actionable: Deploy voice agents for customer-facing business lines to capture leads 24/7
source_title: I Built an AI Voice Agent That Never Misses a Call (No Code)

claim: System prompt context must include current date/time and specific business hours; vague instructions cause hallucination
actionable: Always provide exact operating hours and current date in system prompt to prevent agents from making up information
source_title: I Built an AI Voice Agent That Never Misses a Call (No Code)

claim: Total voice agent latency should stay under 1.2 seconds for natural conversation; above 1.5s feels unacceptably laggy
actionable: Measure latency: transcription + model inference + TTS, aim for components totaling <1.2s
source_title: I Built an AI Voice Agent That Never Misses a Call (No Code)

claim: Voice provider cost breakdown: VoiceAPI transcription $0.01/min, inference varies by model, TTS ~$0.036/min; total ~$0.13/min
actionable: Budget voice agent calls at ~$8/hour; choose model carefully to balance quality and cost
source_title: I Built an AI Voice Agent That Never Misses a Call (No Code)

claim: 11 Labs voice provider produces more natural speech than default options; invest in quality voice for professional impression
actionable: Use 11 Labs as voice provider for voice agents; custom voice IDs make them sound more professional
source_title: I Built an AI Voice Agent That Never Misses a Call (No Code)

claim: Connect Google Calendar API to voice agents to enable real-time appointment booking without hallucination
actionable: Wire agent tools to calendars and databases; agents can now check availability and make bookings
source_title: I Built an AI Voice Agent That Never Misses a Call (No Code)

claim: Tool parameters must include dates, timezones, and format specs; let workflow nodes (n8n) translate agent calls to API calls
actionable: Map agent tool calls to n8n workflows; each tool parameter becomes a webhook payload field
source_title: I Built an AI Voice Agent That Never Misses a Call (No Code)

claim: Respond with JSON not boolean; let agents know whether actions succeeded or failed so they adjust responses
actionable: Return status from tool calls (success/failed/reason); don't silently accept invalid parameters
source_title: I Built an AI Voice Agent That Never Misses a Call (No Code)

claim: Twilio phone numbers cost ~$1/month plus ~$1.50 acquisition; verify yourself once before buying numbers
actionable: Budget phone number costs; set up Twilio verification to enable purchasing
source_title: I Built an AI Voice Agent That Never Misses a Call (No Code)
